reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.312(c)(1) focuses on ensuring the integrity of electronic protected health information (ePHI). In a Kubernetes context, this can be mapped to ensuring that data at rest and in transit is protected against unauthorized modification. This involves enabling encryption for etcd (where cluster state and potentially sensitive information are stored) and Kubernetes Secrets to protect data integrity. Additionally, audit log integrity verification ensures that logs are not tampered with, and secure transport policies in NetworkPolicies ensure data integrity during transmission.
title: 164_312_c_1: 164.312(c)(1) Integrity
